  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AsyncBatchGetBuilder<T>
    Builds an async batch get operation to retrieve multiple items from a single table by their keys.
    AsyncBatchWriteBuilder<T>
    Builds an async batch write operation to put and delete multiple items in a single table.
    AsyncCrossTableBatchGetBuilder
    Builds an async cross-table batch get operation to retrieve items from multiple tables.
    AsyncCrossTableBatchWriteBuilder
    Builds an async cross-table batch write operation to put and delete items across multiple tables.
    AsyncDeleteBuilder<T>
    Async fluent builder for deleting an item from a DynamoDB table by its key, with an optional condition expression.
    AsyncDynamoSimplifiedClient
    Async entry point for the DynamoDB Simplified library.
    AsyncDynamoSimplifiedClientBuilder
    Builder for creating AsyncDynamoSimplifiedClient instances with a custom DynamoDB async client and/or extensions.
    AsyncEntityTable<T>
    Async typed interface for single-table design operations on a DynamoDB table.
    AsyncEntityTableBuilder<T>
    Builder for creating AsyncEntityTable instances for single-table design.
    AsyncExceptionMapper
    Centralized utility for consistent async exception mapping across all async builders.
    AsyncGetItemBuilder<T>
    Async fluent builder for getting an item by key from a DynamoDB table or index.
    AsyncIndex<T>
    Typed wrapper for an async DynamoDB secondary index (GSI or LSI).
    AsyncPutBuilder<T>
    Async fluent builder for putting (inserting or replacing) an item in a DynamoDB table, with an optional condition expression.
    AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    A fluent async builder for querying items in a DynamoDB table.
    AsyncScanBuilder<T>
    A fluent async builder for scanning a DynamoDB table with optional filter, projection, and pagination.
    AsyncTable<T>
    Typed async entry point for DynamoDB operations on a single table.
    AsyncTransactGetBuilder
    Builds an async transactional get operation that reads up to 100 items atomically across one or more tables.
    AsyncTransactWriteBuilder
    Builds an async transactional write operation that groups up to 100 put, update, delete, and condition check actions atomically across one or more tables.
    AsyncUpdateBuilder<T>
    Async fluent builder for updating an item in a DynamoDB table.
    AttributePathParser
    Parses nested attribute paths like address.city and tags[0].name.
    AttributeValueConverter
    Converts Java objects to DynamoDB AttributeValue.
    BatchGetBuilder<T>
    Builds a batch get operation to retrieve multiple items from a single table by their keys.
    BatchGetResult<T>
    Holds the result of a BatchGetBuilder execution.
    BatchWriteBuilder<T>
    Builds a batch write operation to put and delete multiple items in a single table.
    BatchWriteResult
    Holds the result of a BatchWriteBuilder execution.
    ConditionExpression
    A typed wrapper around a condition expression for DynamoDB pre-write gating (PutItem, UpdateItem, DeleteItem, TransactWriteItems condition checks).
    ConditionExpression.Builder
    Fluent builder for ConditionExpression.
    ConditionFailedException
    Thrown when a conditional write (put/update/delete with a condition expression) fails because the condition is not met.
    Consumed
    Interface for result types that may include consumed capacity information.
    CrossEntityResult
    Groups items retrieved from a cross-entity query by their entity type.
    CrossEntityResultWithPagination
    Holds a single page of cross-entity query results along with pagination metadata.
    CrossTableBatchGetBuilder
    Builds a cross-table batch get operation to retrieve items from multiple tables by their keys.
    CrossTableBatchGetResult
    Holds the result of a cross-table batch get operation.
    CrossTableBatchWriteBuilder
    Builds a cross-table batch write operation to put and delete items across multiple tables.
    CrossTableBatchWriteResult
    Holds the result of a cross-table batch write operation.
    DeleteBuilder<T>
    A fluent builder for deleting an item from a DynamoDB table by its key, with an optional condition expression.
    DynamoSimplifiedClient
    Entry point for the DynamoDB Simplified library.
    DynamoSimplifiedClientBuilder
    Builder for creating DynamoSimplifiedClient instances with a custom DynamoDB client and/or extensions.
    DynamoSimplifiedException
    Base exception for all DynamoDB Simplified library errors.
    Entity
    Marks a class as an entity type for single-table DynamoDB designs.
    EntityQueryBuilder
    Builds and executes cross-entity queries across multiple entity types sharing a single DynamoDB table (single-table design).
    EntitySchema<T>
    Captures the schema metadata for an entity type used in single-table designs.
    EntitySchema.KeyComponentInfo
    Describes a single key component part with its attribute name, position, and a strategy for extracting the value from an entity instance.
    EntitySchemaReader
    Reads @Entity and @KeyComponent annotations from a class and produces an EntitySchema.
    EntityTable<T>
    Typed interface for single-table design operations on a DynamoDB table.
    EntityTableBuilder<T>
    Builder for creating EntityTable instances for single-table design.
    FilterExpression
    Fluent builder for constructing DynamoDB filter and condition expressions.
    FilterExpression.AttributeType
    Represents a DynamoDB attribute type for use with FilterExpression.attributeType(String, AttributeType).
    GetItemBuilder<T>
    A fluent builder for retrieving an item from a DynamoDB table by its key, with optional projection and consistent read settings.
    Index<T>
    Typed wrapper for a DynamoDB secondary index (GSI or LSI).
    KeyComponent
    Marks a field or getter method as contributing to a composite key component.
    KeyPrefix
    Sets a static prefix for a composite key component.
    KeyPrefix.Container
    Container annotation for repeatable @KeyPrefix.
    Logging
    Centralized SLF4J logger factory for the DynamoDB Simplified library.
    OperationFailedException
    Thrown when a DynamoDB operation fails due to a service-side error.
    PageCollector
    Utility for bridging Reactive Streams page publishers to CompletableFuture.
    PagedResult<T>
    Holds a single page of results from a DynamoDB Query or Scan operation as part of the DynamoDB Simplified library.
    PathSegment
    A single segment in a parsed dotted attribute path.
    ProjectionExpression
    Fluent builder for constructing DynamoDB projection expressions as part of the DynamoDB Simplified library.
    PutBuilder<T>
    A fluent builder for putting (inserting or replacing) an item in a DynamoDB table, with an optional condition expression.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    A fluent builder for querying items in a DynamoDB table or index.
    RetryUtils
    Shared utility for retry-related operations.
    ScanBuilder<T>
    A fluent builder for scanning a DynamoDB table with optional filter, projection, parallel scan segments, and pagination.
    Table<T>
    Typed entry point for DynamoDB operations on a single table.
    TransactGetBuilder
    Builds a transactional get operation that reads up to 100 items atomically across one or more tables.
    TransactGetResults<T>
    Holds the results of a TransactGetBuilder execution.
    TransactionFailedException
    Thrown when a transactional write operation is rejected by DynamoDB.
    TransactWriteBuilder
    Builds a transactional write operation that groups up to 100 put, update, delete, and condition check actions atomically across one or more tables.
    UpdateBuilder<T>
    A fluent builder for updating an item in a DynamoDB table.
    UpdateExpression
    Fluent builder for constructing DynamoDB update expressions as part of the DynamoDB Simplified library.
    Version
    Marks an attribute as the version field for optimistic locking.
    Versioned
    Interface for entities that support optimistic locking via version field.
    VersionHelper
    Helper for optimistic locking via version fields.
